# runsc-sentry-guard Architecture Context Manifest

## Meta-References
- Compliance & Requirements Architecture Profile: See [/REQUIREMENTS_AND_COMPLIANCE.md]
- Low-Level Technical Implementation Blueprint: See [/TECHNICAL_SPECIFICATION.md]
- Advanced OS Kernel Sandboxing Parameters: See [/SECURITY_HARDENING.md]

## Core Project Objective
- Non-intrusive CNDR daemon designed to watch gVisor (runsc) debug files (*.boot) out-of-band.
- Uses Key-Based Concurrency models to process incoming container events asynchronously.

## Rules Engine Constraints
- Entrypoint logs read line-by-line using Inode tracking loops.
- Matched container IDs verified using a strict hex regex pattern before invoking commands.
- Before firing firewall rules, targets are filtered via the `ipnet` library against a hard exclusion whitelist.
- If a primary playbook step returns an Err status, execution instantly transfers to the hard 'final_actions' block.
